insights.insight: The current product experience is overly complex and intimidating for new users, particularly Gen-Z, leading to high churn rates. This complexity also hampers the onboarding process due to technical issues with e-KYC flow.
supporting_problems: Technical issues with e-KYC flow via Digilocker
Poor discovery and long journey for MTF
evidence: 12% Gen-Z churn rate due to intimidating 'Pro' UI
15% failure rate in e-KYC flow via Digilocker
insights.implication: The product needs to be simplified and streamlined to improve user experience and reduce churn. Implementing a 'Lite' mode and improving the KYC process can help achieve this.
insights.hypothesis: If we simplify the UI and improve the onboarding process, we will see a significant reduction in Gen-Z churn rates.
insights.recommended_action: Develop and launch 'Upstox Lite' mode for first-time investors with an improved KYC process.

insights.insight: Technical stability and real-time data synchronization are crucial for maintaining user trust and competitiveness in the market. Delays in data tracking and updates can lead to loss of user trust.
supporting_problems: Lag in MF SIP dashboard tracking
Concerns regarding loss of user trust due to dashboard lag
evidence: 48-hour lag in MF SIP dashboard tracking
Concerns regarding loss of user trust due to dashboard lag
insights.implication: The product requires significant technical infrastructure upgrades to ensure real-time data synchronization and reduce dependency on third-party APIs.
insights.hypothesis: If we migrate the SIP database for real-time synchronization and reduce third-party API dependencies, we will improve user trust and satisfaction.
insights.recommended_action: Migrate SIP database for real-time synchronization and prioritize reducing third-party API dependencies.

insights.insight: Competitive pressure from rivals like Groww and Angel One necessitates a strategic approach to product development and innovation, focusing on both mass-market accessibility and advanced trading features.
supporting_problems: Competitive pressure from Groww and Angel One
Need for user-friendly design and easy operation
Offers margin trading facility (MTF) and other investment options
evidence: Competitive pressure from Groww and Angel One
User-friendly design and easy to operate
Groww's strategic acquisition of Fisdom for wealth management
insights.implication: The product strategy must balance simplicity and accessibility with advanced features to compete effectively in the market.
insights.hypothesis: If we develop a more user-friendly and accessible product with advanced trading features, we will be able to compete more effectively with Groww and Angel One.
insights.recommended_action: Develop a comprehensive product roadmap that balances mass-market accessibility with advanced trading features and wealth management capabilities.
